violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Sani bucket not made up/ready for use. -Used cloths left draped over hand sink. -Cloths left out sanitizer between uses.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Pink/orange debris at edges of interior panel of ice machine.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Ice build up in bottom of stainless freezer. -Residue at handles and exterior surfaces of both freezers. *Staff were washing surfaces before departure.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitizer solution for three compartment sink was not maintained at the proper concentration. -Bar sani sink found with less than 150ppm Quat solution. *COS to 200ppm. Line was not pushed into chemical of the Sani-T-10 gallon.

Linen storage. — --Clean linen was not stored in a clean, dry location or protected from contamination. -Clean cloths stored in a (permeable) crate on floor below bar 3 comp sink. *COS-Moved off of floor.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Ceiling vent above oven has build up of dust/grease debris. *COS-cleaned by staff while on-site. -No vent cover on wall vent near oven.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
